Row.Text: Restores display choices the game hides: every resolution up to your panel's native, the engine's full UI scale range (50-200%), an auto-scale toggle, and one-click device-aware presets to get the "more zoomed out" look back.
One-click presets tuned to your display. Pick one, then press Confirm. The other controls below update the next time you open Options.
Detected display: {1_Display}. Recommended for "more zoomed out": native resolution at {2_Scale}% UI scale. Apply a preset, then Confirm.

Every standard resolution up to your display's native size, including modes the base game's dropdown leaves out. Higher resolution = more of the map on screen ("more zoomed out"). Takes effect on Confirm.

Size of the whole interface from 50% to 200% (the engine's full range; the built-in slider only reaches 50-125%). Lower = smaller HUD and more visible map. Setting this turns auto-scale off so the value is honoured. Takes effect on Confirm.
When on, the game auto-sizes the UI for your display (the post-patch behaviour that can look "zoomed in"). Turn it off to control size yourself with Global UI scale above.
